segments.text: JUDY: Good morning. Total Insurance.
segments.translation: 茱迪：早上好！这里是TOTAL保险公司。

segments.text: Judy speaking, how may I help you?
segments.translation: 我是茱迪，请问有什么可以帮您？

segments.text: MICHAEL: I recently shipped my belongings from overseas back here to Australia and I took out insurance with your company.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：最近从海外寄了一些东西来澳大利亚，当时我购买了你们公司的保险。

segments.text: Some items were damaged during the move so I need to make a claim.
segments.translation: 我寄的东西有一些在运送过程中损坏了，所以我现在要申请理赔。

segments.text: What do I have to do?
segments.translation: 有哪些手续要办呢？

segments.text: JUDY: Okay, well first I need to get a few details about this.
segments.translation: 茱迪：好的。我先来核对一些具体信息。

segments.text: Can you give me your name please?
segments.translation: 请问您的姓名是？

segments.text: MICHAEL: Yes. It's Michael Alexander.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：好的。迈克尔·亚历山大。

segments.text: JUDY: Okay. And your address please?
segments.translation: 茱迪：好的。请问您的住址是？

segments.text: MICHAEL: My old address or my current one?
segments.translation: 迈克尔：是我的旧住址还是现在的？

segments.text: JUDY: Your current one.
segments.translation: 茱迪：现在的。

segments.text: MICHAEL: It's 24 Manly Street, Milperra near Sydney.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：在悉尼边上，米尔佩拉，曼利街24号。

segments.text: JUDY: What was the suburb, sorry?
segments.translation: 茱迪：是什么地方来着？

segments.text: MICHAEL: Milperra. M-I-L-P-E-R-R-A.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：米尔佩拉，M-I-L-P-E-R-R-A。

segments.text: JUDY: Right. Now, who was the shipping agent Mr Alexander?
segments.translation: 茱迪：好的。接下来，亚历山大先生，请问您的货运代理商是谁？

segments.text: MICHAEL: You mean the company we used?
segments.translation: 迈克尔：你是说我当时选的货运公司吗？

segments.text: JUDY: Yes, the company who packed everything up at the point of origin.
segments.translation: 茱迪：是的，最开始给您打包的那家公司。

segments.text: MICHAEL: Oh, it was ... er ... First Class Movers.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：哦，我选的是……呃……是First Class Movers。

segments.text: JUDY: Okay ... where were the goods shipped from?
segments.translation: 茱迪：好的……是从哪儿寄过来的？

segments.text: MICHAEL: China, but the ship came via Singapore and was there for about a week.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：是从中国寄来的，不过货轮经过了新加坡并且在那儿停了大概一周。

segments.text: JUDY: Don't worry, all of that information will be in the documentation. Now, the dates.
segments.translation: 茱迪：没事儿，这些信息存档里应该都有。接下来是日期。

segments.text: Do you know when the ship arrived?
segments.translation: 您知道货轮什么时候到达的吗？

segments.text: MICHAEL: It left on the 11th of October and got to Sydney on the 28th of November.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：货船10月11日离开，11月28日到的悉尼。

segments.text: JUDY: Okay. I need one more thing.
segments.translation: 茱迪：好的。我还需要最后一项信息。

segments.text: There's a reference number.
segments.translation: 我需要一个编号。

segments.text: It should be in the top right-hand corner of the pink form they gave you.
segments.translation: 应该在粉色的运单的右上角。

segments.text: MICHAEL: Let me have a look.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：我来找找看。

segments.text: I have so many papers.
segments.translation: 我这儿单子太多了。

segments.text: Yes, here it is. It's 601 ACK.
segments.translation: 啊，有了。是610 ACK。

segments.text: JUDY: Thanks.
segments.translation: 茱迪：谢谢。

segments.text: JUDY: I need to take down a few details of the actual damage over the phone before you put in a full report.
segments.translation: 茱迪：现在我还需要记录一下物品破损细节，然后就可以提交完整的报告了。

segments.text: Can you tell me how many items were damaged and what the damage was?
segments.translation: 请您能说一下损坏物品和损坏详情吗？

segments.text: MICHAEL: Yes, well four things actually.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：好的。总共有四件物品。

segments.text: I'll start with the big things.
segments.translation: 我先从大件说起吧。

segments.text: My TV first of all. It's a large one ... very expensive.
segments.translation: 首先是我的电视机。是个大屏幕的……很贵的。

segments.text: JUDY: Our insurance doesn't cover electrical problems.
segments.translation: 茱迪：我们的保险项目不包括电子故障。

segments.text: MICHAEL: It isn't an electrical problem.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：那不是电子故障。

segments.text: The screen has a huge crack in it so it's unusable.
segments.translation: 屏幕上裂了一个大口子，完全没法用了。

segments.text: JUDY: I see. Any idea of the price to repair it?
segments.translation: 茱迪：我知道了。您知道维修费用是多少吗？

segments.text: MICHAEL: No. Well, I don't think it can be repaired.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：不知道。而且我不觉得这个能修好。

segments.text: It will need a new one.
segments.translation: 得换个新的。

segments.text: JUDY: Okay. I'll make a note of that and we'll see what we can do.
segments.translation: 茱迪：好的。我记录一下，然后视情况而定。

segments.text: Now, what was the second item?
segments.translation: 第二件物品是什么呢？

segments.text: MICHAEL: The cabinet from the bathroom was damaged as well.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：浴室柜也坏了。

segments.text: It's a lovely cabinet, we use it to keep our towels in.
segments.translation: 那个柜子很精致，是放毛巾用的。

segments.text: JUDY: And what is the extent of the damage?
segments.translation: 茱迪：损坏程度如何呢？

segments.text: MICHAEL: Well, the back and the sides seem okay but the door has a huge hole in it.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：呃，后面和侧面看着还行，但是门上有一个大洞。

segments.text: It can't be repaired. I'm really not very happy about it.
segments.translation: 这没法修复的。我真的很郁闷。

segments.text: JUDY: And how much do you think it will cost to replace it?
segments.translation: 茱迪：那您觉得换一个新的要多少钱呢？

segments.text: MICHAEL: Well, when I bought it last year I paid $125 for it.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：这个，我是去年买的，当时花了125美元。

segments.text: But the one I've seen here in Sydney is a bit more expensive, it's $140.
segments.translation: 但是我在悉尼看到的同款更贵一些，是140美元。

segments.text: JUDY: Right, and what was the third item?
segments.translation: 茱迪：好的，那第三件呢？

segments.text: MICHAEL: My dining room table. It's a lovely table from Indonesia.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：是我的餐桌。那是一张印尼产的很可爱的餐桌。

segments.text: It must have been very hot inside the container because one leg has completely split down the middle.
segments.translation: 我估计是集装箱里面温度太高了，桌子的一条腿从中间开裂了。

segments.text: The top and the other three look okay thank goodness,
segments.translation: 好在桌面和其他三条腿没事儿。?

segments.text: JUDY: Any idea of the price to repair it?
segments.translation: 茱迪：您知道修复需要花费多少吗？

segments.text: MICHAEL: Well, I had an estimate done on this actually because it is a very special table to us.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：我已经找人估算过了，因为这张桌子对我们来说太特别了。

segments.text: They quoted us $200, which is really pricey so I hope the insurance will cover the total cost.
segments.translation: 他们的报价很高，200美元，所以我希望保险能够涵盖所有的费用。

segments.text: JUDY: I'm sure that will be fine.
segments.translation: 茱迪：这应该没有问题。

segments.text: What was the last item, Mr Alexander?
segments.translation: 最后一项是什么，亚历山大先生？

segments.text: MICHAEL: Well, we have a lovely set of china plates and dishes, you know, with matching cups, saucers, the lot.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：我们有一套瓷的餐具，就是那种带配套的杯子啊碟子啊的那种全套的。

segments.text: They were all in the one box which must have got dropped because some plates were broken - six actually.
segments.translation: 它们被打包在一个箱子里，然后这个箱子肯定是摔过了，因为有6个碟子碎了。

segments.text: JUDY: And can you tell me the replacement value of these?
segments.translation: 茱迪：您能告诉我换新的费用吗？

segments.text: MICHAEL: Well, it's hard to say because they were part of a set but they can be up to $10 each as it's such a good set.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：这个不好说，因为它们是套装里的，但我觉得每个碟子的价格差不多在10美元左右，因为这是一套很高档的套装。

segments.text: JUDY: Okay, so that would be around $60 altogether?
segments.translation: 茱迪：好的，那么一共是大概60美元对吧？

segments.text: MICHAEL: Yes, that's right.
segments.translation: 迈克尔：是的。

segments.text: JUDY: And is that all of the items?
segments.translation: 茱迪：就这些了吗？

segments.text: MICHAEL: Yes. So what do I have to do now?
segments.translation: 迈克尔：是的。那接下来我要做些什么呢？
